base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of samus_jump — a character (playable) from 1986 metroid. Jump pose — knees tucked. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Jump pose — knees tucked; single-frame as normal jump
